allow: PowerShell(claude mcp add magic --scope user --env API_KEY="f749f3ea33f73aa2c378e3f59b0ce13c039500e6d2c3f69ab31b620a8a33cd45" -- npx -y "@21st-dev/magic@latest")
PowerShell($claudeCmd = "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\claude.cmd"; if \(Test-Path $claudeCmd\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $claudeCmd" } else { Write-Output "NOT FOUND - claude CLI is not installed via npm" })

PowerShell(Copy-Item "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude.json" "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude.json.bak-mcp" -Force; $configPath = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude.json"; $config = Get-Content $configPath -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $magic = [PSCustomObject]@{ type = "stdio"; command = "npx"; args = @\("-y", "@21st-dev/magic@latest"\); env = [PSCustomObject]@{ API_KEY = "f749f3ea33f73aa2c378e3f59b0ce13c039500e6d2c3f69ab31b620a8a33cd45" } }; $mcpServers = [PSCustomObject]@{ magic = $magic }; $config | Add-Member -NotePropertyName mcpServers -NotePropertyValue $mcpServers -Force; \($config | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20\) | Out-File $configPath -Encoding utf8 -NoNewline; Write-Output "DONE - magic MCP added at user scope")
Bash(python scripts/search.py "portfolio artist 3D photography editorial premium creative" --design-system -p "Studio Portfolio" -f markdown)
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK sections:', list\(d['sections'].keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Sections:', list\(d['sections'].keys\(\)\)\); print\('Total projects:', sum\(len\(s.get\('projects',[]\)\) for s in d['sections'].values\(\)\)\)")
